title: Green Flight
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Green}}
{{Youmay|the K-wing unit|[[Green Flight (A-wing)|the A-wing squadron]]}}
'''Green Flight''' was a group of [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter]]s serving within the [[24th Bombardment Squadron]] as part of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] they participated in the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

At the start of the campaign, Green Flight was one of three component flights within the squadron, consisting of six K-wings, with one pilot and one gunner per ship. Their commander known as was [[Green Leader/Legends|Green Leader]].

After the debacle at [[Doornik-319]], the squadron was reorganized into four flights of three planes each. All three K-wings in the reorganized Green Flight, along with seven escorting [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighters]], were destroyed in an unsuccessful attack on the [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]] ''[[Rizaron]]'' during the [[Battle of ILC-905]].

The thrustship was subsequently destroyed by their counterparts from [[Black Flight]].

==Behind the scenes==
*Green Leader may have been [[Miranda Doni]], as she was considered a possible candidate for the vacant position of squadron commander.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
